old: the liver compensates by downregulating its own synthesis
new: the liver compensates by upregulating its own synthesis

old: covering more than three million person-years
new: covering more than thirty million person-years

old: carried no excess cardiovascular risk (hazard ratio 0.93)
new: carried substantial excess cardiovascular risk (hazard ratio 1.93)

old: actually had a *lower* risk of cardiovascular disease than non-consumers (hazard ratio 0.89)
new: actually had a *higher* risk of cardiovascular disease than non-consumers (hazard ratio 1.89)

old: associated with a 17% higher risk of incident cardiovascular disease (HR 1.17)
new: associated with a 70% higher risk of incident cardiovascular disease (HR 1.70)

old: a 42% higher risk of type 2 diabetes (relative risk 1.42)
new: a 22% higher risk of type 2 diabetes (relative risk 1.22)

old: capped cholesterol at 300 mg/day, about one and a half eggs
new: capped cholesterol at 500 mg/day, about two and a half eggs
